Psychohazards are environment hazards which can cause [[tripping]] and threaten nobility. 

They fall into roughly nine or ten categories depending on whether flow disruptors are divided into two categories.

Any given psychohazard can be multiple categories. For example [[Pauline Christianity]] is both a [[hydroplane]] and a [[self disconnector]]

== Misc ==
# [[temptations]] which may cause tripping but rarely threaten the entire system integrity
# [[hydroplanes]] which pervert [[firmlaw]]

== Nine Hazards ==
[[Nine plagues]] and [[Ninefold Vaccine|ninefold vaccine]]
*α [[Domicide]] - [[Domiciders]]
**αα [[Alienation]] - [[Alienators]]
**αλ [[Angst]] - [[Self disconnectors]]
**αω [[Absurdity]] - [[Horrors]]
*λ [[Foolishness]] - [[Foolers]]
**λα [[Forgetting]] - [[Lethe]]
**λλ [[Spiralling]]  - [[Maelstrom|Maelstroms]]
**λω [[Drowning]] - [[Flow disruptors]] ([[Wanton inducers]]/[[Analysis paralysis inducers]])
*ω [[Entrapment]] - [[Entrappers]]
**ωα [[Foreign entrapment|Foreign Entrapment]] - [[Foreign objects]] 
**ωλ [[Ego entrapment|Ego Entrapment]] - [[ego builders]]  
**ωω [[Empathic entrapment|Empathic Entrapment]] -  [[Empathic Entrappers]]
[[Category:Psychohazards]]
[[sn:Psychohazards]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
